vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry identifies P1 (String of Nickels), P2 (Mexican Mint), P3 (Pothos), and P4 (Silver Guest). Visual evidence confirms P1 (Yellow Pot), P3 (Black Pot with Rabbit), and P4 (Black Pot, foreground). P2 is not clearly demarcated as a separate entity; it appears to be integrated or lost within the P4/P1 cluster.

plant_audit.P1: String of Nickels: Stable, showing consistent succulent foliage.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos: Significant decline. One leaf is necrotic/yellowed; the other shows signs of chlorosis.
plant_audit.P4: Silver Guest: Single, elongated leaf remains. Appears to be a solitary survivor of a previous multi-specimen planting.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistent dampness observed across all pots; no surface cracking.
biome_observations.debris: White perlite/egg-shell fragments present on soil surfaces. No fungal blooms detected.

temporal_deltas.t-4_to_t-3: P3 leaf yellowing intensifies; P4 leaf remains static.
temporal_deltas.t-3_to_t-2: P3 leaf necrosis progresses; P1 foliage remains stable.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_t-1: P3 leaf shows further postural collapse; P4 leaf remains turgid.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: P3 leaf is now fully necrotic/browned. P4 leaf remains the only healthy-looking specimen in the foreground pot.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: P3 is in a state of terminal decline (necrosis). P4 is stable but lacks vigor. P1 is the most resilient specimen in the current biome.
vision_report.anomalies: The 'White Rabbit' anchor is stable. No new introductions detected. The primary anomaly is the progressive senescence of the P3 Pothos leaf.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is currently undergoing a period of stress, specifically within the P3 Pothos specimen, which has transitioned from chlorosis to full necrosis over the 5-day observation period. The P4 specimen remains a solitary, stable focal point. The P1 String of Nickels in the yellow pot maintains the highest level of health. The environment is stable, but the P3 occupant requires immediate intervention to prevent total loss.
